<!-- Thanks for contributing to DUTler! Please read CONTRIBUTING.md first. -->

## What & why
Brief description of the change and the problem it solves. Link any related issue (`Fixes #…`).

## How it was tested
- [ ] Builds cleanly (`cmake --build build`)
- [ ] Verified on hardware (describe: board, wiring, commands) — for behaviour changes
- [ ] `selftest` / loopback / relevant `tools/` checks pass

## Checklist
- [ ] Matches the surrounding code style; no new dependencies / floating point unless justified
- [ ] New files carry the SPDX header (`Apache-2.0`)
- [ ] Docs updated (README / comments) where relevant
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`, DCO) — contribution provided under Apache-2.0
